# Vanguard Flow & Spark — Elettricista & Idraulico Nord Italia

## Who We Are
Vanguard Flow & Spark is a professional electrical and plumbing service company operating across northern Italy. We serve both residential and commercial clients with fast response times, transparent pricing, and certified technicians. Available 7 days a week, 07:00–21:00.

## Core Services

### Electrical Services (Impianti Elettrici)
- Installation, maintenance and repair of residential and commercial electrical systems
- Electrical panels and differential switches
- Wiring and new lighting points
- Earthing and system inspection
- Sockets, switches and lighting fixtures

### Plumbing Services (Impianti Idraulici)
- Water leak detection and repair
- Tap and mixer replacement
- Installation of toilets, showers and basins
- Drainage and waste pipe management
- Full hydraulic system management

### Emergency Interventions (Interventi Urgenti)
- Power outages and major electrical faults
- Sudden water leaks
- Blocked drains
- Urgent appointment availability

### Renovation Work (Ristrutturazioni)
- Complete electrical system for new builds and renovations
- Plumbing and heating installation
- Turnkey bathrooms and kitchens
- Certification and testing documentation

## Service Area
Northern Italy (Nord Italia), including:
Milano, Torino, Bergamo, Brescia, Verona, Vicenza, Padova, Venezia, Bologna, Modena, Parma, Genova, Como, Monza, Varese, Novara, Treviso, Udine — and surrounding provinces.

## Key Facts
- 500+ satisfied clients
- Average rating: 4.9/5
- Available: Monday–Sunday, 07:00–21:00
- Free quote: always, no commitment
- Same-day intervention available for emergencies
- Single point of contact — speak directly with the technician

## Why Choose Us
- Transparent quotes: full breakdown before any work begins, no hidden costs
- Punctuality: confirmed appointment times with advance notice of any changes
- Clean worksite: full clean-up after every job
- Direct communication: no call centres, direct line to the operative

Also serves French and German-speaking clients in border areas.
